title: ampacus
intro: Ampacus is a plant-based substance that refers to the dried sap of the Croton lechleri tree, native to the Amazon rainforest. This sap has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ampacus include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Ampacus can be prepared in herbal supplements, tinctures, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
